chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 405 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.3501/2021 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.3502/2021 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of bail application 30-06-2021 Mr. Muhammad Ali Napar, Advocate for applicant / accused..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Applicant / accused Attaullah son of Khan Muhammad Kalwar seeks protective bail in Crime No.53 of 2021, registered at Police Station Railway Police, Multan, for offenses punishable under Sections 471, 420, 468 read with Sections 5, 47 of Prevention of Corruption Act, 1947. It is, inter alia, contended by learned counsel for the applicant / accused that the applicant is prepared to surrender before the learned trial Court, but apprehends his arrest as NBW has been issued against him by the learned trial Court which is at Multan. It is further contended that the premises of the learned trial Court are cordoned off by the police. Without touching the merits of the case, protective bail is granted to the applicant / accused for a period of ten days subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.10,000/- (Rupees ten thousand) and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court. In the meanwhile, operation of NBW, if any, is suspended for a period of ten days. Applicant / accused is directed to surrender before the learned trial Court in the aforesaid period. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of ten days or whenever the applicant / accused surrenders before the learned trial Court, which one occurs earlier.

Applicant / accused is directed to surrender before the learned trial Court in the aforesaid period. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of ten days or whenever the applicant / accused surrenders before the learned trial Court, which one occurs earlier. It is made clear that in case the applicant / accused fails to surrender before the learned trial Court in the aforesaid period, his bail bond shall stand automatically forfeited. Criminal Bail Application stands disposed of along with the listed applications in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
